initiatives.name: PFLAG Tulsa
initiatives.description: A local chapter providing support, education, and advocacy for LGBTQ+ people, their families, and allies in Tulsa. They coordinate mutual aid efforts, peer support groups, and community resources while building networks of care and solidarity for the LGBTQ+ community.

initiatives.name: Tulsa Tenants Union
initiatives.description: A tenant-led organization fighting for housing justice and tenants' rights in Tulsa through mutual aid, direct action, and collective organizing. They provide resources and support for tenants facing eviction, coordinate housing advocacy, and build tenant power through education and solidarity networks.

initiatives.name: Really Really Free Market Tulsa
initiatives.description: A grassroots organization fostering mutual aid and community support through free markets and resource sharing in Tulsa. They coordinate direct assistance, free item distribution, and solidarity networks while building power through community organizing and creating spaces for gift economy and collective care.

initiatives.name: We Do This Together
initiatives.description: A grassroots mutual aid collective fostering community solidarity and support in Tulsa. They coordinate direct assistance, resource sharing, and community care initiatives while building power through collective action and creating spaces for mutual support and community resilience.

initiatives.name: Tulsa Intersectional Care Network
initiatives.description: A mutual aid collective focused on providing intersectional care and support to marginalized communities in Tulsa. They coordinate direct assistance, resource distribution, and community care initiatives while building networks of solidarity and mutual support across intersecting identities and experiences.

initiatives.name: Cooperation Tulsa
initiatives.description: A grassroots mutual aid organization building cooperative economics and community solidarity in Tulsa. They coordinate resource sharing, skill-building initiatives, and solidarity networks while building power through cooperative development, community education, and creating pathways for economic democracy.

initiatives.name: Tulsa Food Not Bombs
initiatives.description: mutual aid org in tulsa, ok, sharing veg meals/clothes/ gear weekly since 2020
